title: Email Handler
excerpt: description: Email Workers Runtime API reference for handling, forwarding, rejecting, and replying to incoming emails. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/email-routing/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. An `EmailEvent` is the event type to programmatically process your emails with a Worker. You can reject, forward, or drop emails according to the logic you construct in your Worker. `EmailEvent` can be handled in Workers functions written using the [ES modules format](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/reference/migrate-to-module-workers/) by adding an `email` function to your module's exported handlers:
